_comment: Store 2 entry tripwires (ENTRY-role cameras only). Draw each with pipeline/calibrate.py --mode line: click p1 then p2 ACROSS the door threshold (just inside the glass so foot-points stay visible), then a 3rd point on the store-floor (inside) side. entry 1 and entry 2 are the SAME doorway recorded at DIFFERENT times (different days) -> draw a tripwire on each; their events fall in different windows so they never double-count the same person. Keys are added here when you calibrate them.
